title: All Chains Status Monitor
body: Fetch the real-time sync status of all 200+ GoldRush-supported chains â€” latest indexed block, sync lag, and chain metadata. Ideal for multi-chain app health checks.

title: Anchor Program Data Reader
body: Fetch and decode the on-chain state of any Anchor-based Solana program account via GoldRush — pass a program ID and account address to get fully-typed, human-readable account data with field names and values, using the program's published IDL for deserialization. No custom Borsh deserializer required. Works with any program that has a public IDL: Raydium AMM pools, Drift user accounts, Kamino lending positions, Marinade stake state. Read protocol state directly in your app or agent without a local Anchor client.

title: API Reference
body: Interactive API explorer and full reference docs for all GoldRush endpoints.

title: Block Date Lookup
body: Convert any date range to block numbers on any EVM chain — essential for historical queries and event log scanning.

title: Block Explorer Lite
body: Full-featured mini block explorer for any EVM chain — search by block, transaction hash, or wallet address, with decoded event logs and internal transfers.

title: Gas Price Widget
body: Embeddable real-time gas tracker with open/fast/instant tiers and USD fee estimates — drop it into any dApp to show live network conditions.

title: GoldRush Kit Approval Manager
body: Drop-in React component that shows all active ERC-20 and NFT approvals for a wallet using ApprovalsListView â€” with built-in revoke functionality.

title: GoldRush Kit Token Balances
body: Drop-in React component for a full token balances table â€” ERC-20 + native â€” using GoldRush Kit's TokenBalancesListView. Ships with sorting, USD values, logos, and spam filtering.

title: GoldRush Kit Transaction Feed
body: Drop-in React component rendering a paginated, decoded transaction activity feed for any wallet using WalletActivityListView.

title: GoldRush Playground
body: Browser-based API playground for testing GoldRush queries without writing code.

title: GoldRush React Hooks
body: Drop-in React hooks for balances, NFTs, and token prices â€” onchain data made simple.

title: GoldRush TypeScript SDK
body: Official TypeScript SDK with full type safety for every GoldRush API endpoint.

title: Quickstart Templates
body: Starter templates for building onchain apps with Next.js, Vite, and React.

title: Solana GoldRush Quickstart
body: Scaffold a production-ready Solana wallet dashboard in one command using the GoldRush Next.js starter for Solana — pre-wired with `@covalenthq/client-sdk`, Solana wallet adapter (Phantom/Backpack/Solflare), and four ready-to-run components: SPL token balances table with USD values, decoded transaction history feed with program labels, Metaplex NFT gallery, and a wallet age summary card. Clone, add `GOLDRUSH_API_KEY=your_key` to `.env.local`, run `npm dev`, and ship. No blockchain parsing required.

title: Webhook Builder
body: Configure real-time webhooks for wallet events, transfers, and contract interactions.
